text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
What's with all these cardboard boxes?! How am I
supposed to walk anywhere?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ah... sorry about that. I just received this month's
fan letters. I'll put them away as soon as I finish
reading them.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Would you mind waiting there until then?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
The floor isn't available at the moment, but I have
room on my desk and bed, so you can put your
stuff there for now.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Let me just read ten more of these, then I'll clear
some space. It's so difficult finding time to get
through them all.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You must receive hundreds of fan letters... Do you really
read all of them?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hm? You're not going to sit down?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Um... I decided to change plans.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to go for a run, so you can take your
time and read all you want!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Heh. Well, I'm not about to turn down more
reading time.
